ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Disputatio Unica Doctoris Ioannis Heckii Equitis Lyncaei Daventriensis.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: De peste et quare Praecipue grassetur tot ab hinc Annis in Belgio. Ad Ill.mum Principem Fredericum Caesium Marchionem Monti Celii & c., Baronem & Heroa Romanum Mecaenatem inclytum. Cum Descriptione Electuarii Lyncaei cuius usu Author has regiones accedens per Dei gratiam, saluus evasit, et de huius Antidoti praecipuis operationibus.
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Ioannes wrote the dedication to Cesi, while Wilhelm wrote the dedication to Lincei academicians.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
